task_completion.description: Create the vertical spine on the Y-axis with correct endpoints
task_completion.visual_evidence: A vertical line segment is drawn on the Y-axis. On-screen dimensions or the property browser should indicate endpoints at (0, 30) and (0, -25), or a length of 55 constrained to the origin appropriately.

task_completion.description: Create the Top Corner Arc with a 15 mm radius
task_completion.visual_evidence: An arc is connected to the top of the spine, curving into the top-right (first quadrant). There should be a visible radial constraint of '15' and a tangent constraint symbol where it meets the vertical spine.

task_completion.description: Create the Bottom Corner Arc with a 10 mm radius
task_completion.visual_evidence: An arc is connected to the bottom of the spine, curving into the bottom-right (fourth quadrant). There should be a visible radial constraint of '10' and a tangent constraint symbol where it meets the vertical spine.

task_completion.description: Create the Basket Arc with a 70 mm radius connecting the corner arcs
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large arc connects the top and bottom corner arcs, bulging to the right to form a D-shape. There should be a visible radial constraint of '70' and tangent constraint symbols at both connection points.

task_completion.description: Ensure the sketch has 0 degrees of freedom
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace text window/property browser (usually in the top left) displays '0 degrees of freedom' or 'ok', indicating the sketch is fully constrained.

task_completion.description: Save the sketch to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace window title bar or a 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'carabiner_profile.slvs' being saved in the '~/Documents/SolveSpace' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the sketch
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace application interface (canvas, toolbars, property browser) being actively used, rather than a terminal or text editor.
Multiple screenshots show the step-by-step construction of the profile (e.g., drawing lines, adding arcs, applying constraints) rather than instantly loading a completed file.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the GUI by writing the .slvs file directly
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen using a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) or a python script to manually write the raw text data of the .slvs file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/carabiner_profile.slvs. The sketch must have a top corner radius of 15, a bottom corner radius of 10, a basket arc radius of 70, a top endpoint Y-coordinate of 30, and a bottom endpoint Y-coordinate of -25. The sketch must be fully constrained (0 degrees of freedom).
